chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 134 of 1998 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of C.M.A 1119/2013 2. For Regular Hearing. 02.11.2016. Mst. Salam Bano, Legal Heir No.4 of Applicant No.1. Mr. Naimatullah Soomro, Advocate for respondents. -.-.-. On 10.10.2013, a detailed order was passed after taking into account the nature of proceedings and various other facts including the status of purported legal heirs. It was specifically observed that if on next date of hearing the applicants’ side fails to proceed with the matter, the same shall be deemed to be dismissed for non-prosecution without any further order. Today, Mst. Salma Bano claiming to be one of the legal heirs has submitted that her Counsel Mr. Moulvi Iqbal Hyder is in Islamabad. On 10.10.2013 when the above order was passed even on that date Mr. Moulvi Iqbal Hyder was not present and was reported to be busy at Principal Seat. In view of order passed on 10.10.2013, which is still holding the field, the instant Revision Application is consequently dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE
